hero.title: Where Every Bloom Tells a Story
hero.subtitle: Discover our premium collection of artisanal floral arrangements, curated to bring elegance and joy to your most cherished moments.

occasions.title: For Every Moment
occasions.description: Whether it's a celebration, a milestone, or a gesture of comfort, we have the perfect floral arrangement to express your feelings.

about.title: About Fiorisce
about.quote: Where Every Bloom Tells A Story
about.body: At Fiorisce Floristry, we believe flowers do more than look beautiful. They carry feelings, mark special moments, and say things words sometimes cannot. Every arrangement is carefully made by hand, with flowers chosen to feel personal, warm, and meaningful. Whether it is a celebration, a quiet moment, or a simple gesture of care, we are here to help you share it beautifully.

hero.subtitle: Handcrafted with seasonal blooms - find the perfect arrangement for every moment.

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.mustRead: MUST READ BEFORE CONTINUING YOUR ORDER
rules: Delivery/Pickup can only be done during store operational hours: Monday - Friday (09:00 - 19:00) & Saturday (10:00 - 20:00).
Bouquets in photos are for reference only and cannot be made 100% identical due to handmade production.
Fiorisce address: Jl.Palakali Raya No.69, Kukusan, Depok (Fiorisce Floristry on Gojek).
For Gojek deliveries, the use of a paper bag is mandatory.
L & XL bouquet deliveries require a car (Fiorisce is not responsible for damage caused by incorrect delivery modes).
Fresh flower prices may change depending on farmer harvest conditions.
Orders will only be processed after payment has been made.
Fiorisce reserves the right to reject revisions not communicated at the beginning of the order.
Payments made cannot be refunded or exchanged, except in cases of order discrepancies.
Specifically for fresh flower products, rescheduling the pickup date is not allowed, as fresh flowers are prepared in advance.
For orders > 500k IDR, a 60% down payment (DP) can be made, with the remaining balance due D-1 when the product is ready (DP is non-refundable).
termsAndConditions.closingBody:
Fiorisce
Est. 2023
"Where Every Bloom Tells a Story"
